# Support

Cloudflare Support-focused documentation

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [Support llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/llms-full.txt) for the complete Support documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Overview

- [Support](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/index.md)

## Contacting Cloudflare Support

- [Contacting Cloudflare Support](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/contacting-cloudflare-support/index.md): Learn how to contact Cloudflare Support via community, chat, or phone. Get help with issues, verify identity, and understand SLAs for different plans.

## Cloudflare Status

- [Cloudflare Status](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/cloudflare-status/index.md): Check Cloudflare service status and configure notifications.

## Disruptive Maintenance

- [Disruptive Maintenance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/disruptive-maintenance/index.md): Understand Cloudflare scheduled maintenance windows.

## third-party-software

- [Cloudflare WordPress Plugin Automatic Cache Management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/cloudflare-wordpress-plugin-automatic-cache-management/index.md): Manage automatic cache purging with the WordPress plugin.
- [How do I enable HTTP2 Server Push in WordPress](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/how-do-i-enable-http2-server-push-in-wordpress/index.md): Enable HTTP/2 Server Push with the WordPress plugin.
- [Improving web security for content management systems like WordPress](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/improving-web-security-for-content-management-systems-like-wordpress/index.md): Improve WordPress security with Cloudflare features.
- [Speed Up WordPress and Improve Performance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/speed-up-wordpress-and-improve-performance/index.md): Optimize WordPress performance with Cloudflare CDN.
- [What settings are applied when I click Optimize Cloudflare for WordPress in Cloudflare's WordPress plugin](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/what-settings-are-applied-when-i-click-optimize-cloudflare-for-wordpress-in-cloudflares-wordpress-plugin/index.md): Troubleshoot what settings are applied when i click optimize cloudflare for wordpress issues with Cloudflare.
- [WordPress Jetpack and Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/wordpress-jetpack-and-cloudflare/index.md): Configure Jetpack and Cloudflare to work together.
- [WordPress.com and Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/content-management-system-cms/wordpresscom-and-cloudflare/index.md): Configure WordPress.com with Cloudflare services.
- [Using Cloudflare with various forums](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/forum-software/using-cloudflare-with-various-forums-vbulletin-xenforo-mybb/index.md): Use Cloudflare with vBulletin, Xenforo, and other forums.
- [Configure Cloudflare and Heroku over HTTPS](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/others/configure-cloudflare-and-heroku-over-https/index.md): Set up Cloudflare with Heroku for HTTPS traffic.
- [Reduce data transfer (egress costs) between Azure and Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/third-party-software/others/reduce-data-transfer-egress-costs-between-azure-and-cloudflare/index.md): Lower Azure egress costs using Microsoft Routing Preference.

## troubleshooting

- [Cannot locate dashboard account](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/cannot-locate-dashboard-account/index.md): Resolve issues linking dashboard and support accounts.
- [Gathering information for troubleshooting sites](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/gathering-information-for-troubleshooting-sites/index.md): Collect diagnostic data for Cloudflare support tickets.
- [Cloudflare traffic not being sent to the geographically closest data center](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/geographic-traffic-routing/index.md): Understand anycast routing to non-local data centers.
- [Not receiving emails from Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/not-receiving-cloudflare-emails/index.md): Troubleshoot missing transactional emails from Cloudflare.
- [Potential ISP blocking of Cloudflare IP addresses](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/potential-isp-blocking/index.md): Understand ISP blocking of shared Cloudflare IPs.
- [Potential disruption of services for Russian users](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/service-disruption/index.md): Understand ISP throttling affecting Russian users.
- [Third-party load balancers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/third-party-load-balancers/index.md): Troubleshoot Cloudflare with third-party load balancers.
- [Troubleshoot crawl errors](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/general-troubleshooting/troubleshooting-crawl-errors/index.md): Fix search engine crawler issues with Cloudflare.
- [1xx Informational](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/1xx-informational/index.md): Understand 1xx informational HTTP status codes.
- [2xx Success](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/2xx-success/index.md): Understand 2xx success HTTP status codes.
- [3xx Redirection](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/3xx-redirection/index.md): Understand 3xx redirection HTTP status codes.
- [4xx Client Error](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/index.md): Troubleshoot 4xx client error HTTP status codes.
- [Error 400](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-400/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 400 error responses.
- [Error 401](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-401/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 401 error responses.
- [Error 403](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-403/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 403 error responses.
- [Error 404](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-404/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 404 error responses.
- [Error 405](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-405/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 405 error responses.
- [Error 406](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-406/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 406 error responses.
- [Error 407](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-407/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 407 error responses.
- [Error 408](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-408/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 408 error responses.
- [Error 409](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-409/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 409 error responses.
- [Error 410](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-410/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 410 error responses.
- [Error 411](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-411/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 411 error responses.
- [Error 412](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-412/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 412 error responses.
- [Error 413](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-413/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 413 error responses.
- [Error 414](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-414/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 414 error responses.
- [Error 415](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-415/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 415 error responses.
- [Error 416](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-416/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 416 error responses.
- [Error 417](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-417/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 417 error responses.
- [Error 429](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-429/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 429 error responses.
- [Error 451](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-451/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 451 error responses.
- [Error 499](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/http-status-codes/4xx-client-error/error-499/index.md): Troubleshoot HTTP 499 error responses.

- [Restoring original visitor IPs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/support/troubleshooting/restoring-visitor-ips/restoring-original-visitor-ips/index.md): Configure your server to log original visitor IPs.
